lobby.title: 三国杀 · Three Kingdoms Kill
lobby.share_code: Share this code with your friends.
prompt.act: Your action phase — play a card or end it
prompt.respond_dodge: You are the target of a Strike — play a Dodge?
prompt.respond_peach: You are dying — use a Peach?
prompt.respond_peach_for: {{player}} is dying — use a Peach to save them?
prompt.discard: Discard down to your hand limit
prompt.rejected: The server rejected that move as illegal
prompt.blocked_wrong_card: This card can't answer this request
prompt.blocked_strike_limit: You've used your Strike limit this turn
prompt.blocked_not_wounded: You're not wounded — no Peach needed
prompt.blocked_choose_instead: Answer by picking one of their cards below
skill.jianxiong.name: Villainous Hero
skill.jianxiong.desc: After you take damage, you may take the card that dealt it into your hand.
skill.hujia.name: Royal Guard
skill.hujia.desc: Lord skill. When you need to play a Dodge, other Wei characters may, in turn order, play one on your behalf.
skill.fankui.name: Reprisal
skill.fankui.desc: After you take damage, you may take one card from the source of that damage.
skill.guicai.name: Ghostly Talent
skill.guicai.desc: Before any character's judgement card takes effect, you may play a hand card to replace it.
skill.ganglie.name: Unyielding
skill.ganglie.desc: After you take damage, you may judge: unless the result is a Heart, the source must discard two hand cards or take 1 damage from you.
skill.tuxi.name: Raid
skill.tuxi.desc: In your draw phase you may skip drawing and instead take one hand card from each of up to two other characters.
skill.luoyi.name: Bare-Chested
skill.luoyi.desc: In your draw phase you may draw one card fewer; if you do, damage you deal with Strike or Duel this turn is increased by 1.
skill.tiandu.name: Envy of Heaven
skill.tiandu.desc: After your judgement card takes effect, you may take it into your hand.
skill.yiji.name: Legacy
skill.yiji.desc: After you take 1 damage, you may draw two cards and distribute them to any characters.
skill.qingguo.name: Peerless Beauty
skill.qingguo.desc: You may use or play a black hand card as a Dodge.
skill.luoshen.name: Spirit of the Luo
skill.luoshen.desc: At the start of your turn you may judge: if the result is black you take the card, and may repeat.
skill.rende.name: Benevolence
skill.rende.desc: In your action phase you may give any number of hand cards to other characters; if you have given at least two this turn, you recover 1 HP.
skill.jijiang.name: Bravery
skill.jijiang.desc: Lord skill. When you need to play a Strike, other Shu characters may, in turn order, play one on your behalf.
skill.wusheng.name: God of War
skill.wusheng.desc: You may use or play any red card as a Strike.
skill.paoxiao.name: Roar
skill.paoxiao.desc: Locked skill. You may play any number of Strikes during your action phase.
skill.guanxing.name: Stargazing
skill.guanxing.desc: At the start of your turn you may look at the top X cards (X = living characters, max 5) and put them back on top or at the bottom in any order.
skill.kongcheng.name: Empty Fort
skill.kongcheng.desc: Locked skill. While you have no hand cards, you cannot be targeted by Strike or Duel.
skill.longdan.name: Dragon Heart
skill.longdan.desc: You may use or play a Strike as a Dodge, and a Dodge as a Strike, from your hand.
skill.mashu.name: Horsemanship
skill.mashu.desc: Locked skill. Your distance to every other character is reduced by 1.
skill.tieji.name: Iron Cavalry
skill.tieji.desc: After you name a target with a Strike, you may judge: if the result is red, that Strike cannot be dodged.
skill.jizhi.name: Wisdom
skill.jizhi.desc: When you play a non-delayed trick card, you may draw a card.
skill.qicai.name: Ingenuity
skill.qicai.desc: Locked skill. Your trick cards ignore distance limits.
skill.zhiheng.name: Balance of Power
skill.zhiheng.desc: Once per action phase you may discard any number of cards and then draw that many.
skill.jiuyuan.name: Rescue
skill.jiuyuan.desc: Lord skill, locked. When another Wu character uses a Peach on you while you are dying, you recover 1 extra HP.
skill.qixi.name: Surprise Raid
skill.qixi.desc: You may use any black card as a Dismantle.
skill.keji.name: Self-Restraint
skill.keji.desc: If you neither used nor played a Strike during your action phase, you may skip your discard phase.
skill.kurou.name: Flesh Wound
skill.kurou.desc: In your action phase you may lose 1 HP and then draw two cards.
skill.yingzi.name: Heroic Spirit
skill.yingzi.desc: Locked skill. You draw one extra card in your draw phase.
skill.fanjian.name: Sow Discord
skill.fanjian.desc: Once per action phase: another character names a suit, then takes one of your hand cards and reveals it; if the suit differs, you deal 1 damage to them.
skill.guose.name: National Beauty
skill.guose.desc: You may use any Diamond card as an Indulgence.
skill.liuli.name: Wandering
skill.liuli.desc: When you are targeted by a Strike, you may discard a card to transfer it to another character within your attack range (not the Strike's user).
skill.qianxun.name: Modesty
skill.qianxun.desc: Locked skill. You cannot be targeted by Steal or Indulgence.
skill.lianying.name: Chain Camps
skill.lianying.desc: When you lose your last hand card, you may draw a card.
skill.jieyin.name: Marriage
skill.jieyin.desc: Once per action phase you may discard two hand cards and choose a wounded male character: you and they each recover 1 HP.
skill.xiaoji.name: Warrior Lady
skill.xiaoji.desc: When you lose a card from your equipment zone, you may draw two cards.
skill.jijiu.name: First Aid
skill.jijiu.desc: Outside your own turn, you may use any red card as a Peach.
skill.qingnang.name: Healing Salve
skill.qingnang.desc: Once per action phase you may discard a hand card to let a wounded character recover 1 HP.
skill.wushuang.name: Peerless
skill.wushuang.desc: Locked skill. Your Strike must be answered with two Dodges; a character duelling you must play two Strikes each round.
skill.lijian.name: Sow Dissent
skill.lijian.desc: Once per action phase you may discard a card and choose two male characters: one is treated as playing a Duel on the other.
skill.biyue.name: Moonlight
skill.biyue.desc: At the end of your turn you may draw a card.
select.title: Choose your general
select.you_picked: You picked {{general}}. Waiting for the others…
demand.dodge: A Strike is coming at you
log.kill_reward: {{player}} claims the bounty and draws {{n}} cards
log.kill_penalty: {{player}} killed a Loyalist — hand and equipment forfeited
choose.frost_blade: Choose a card for them to discard
choose.rock_cleaving_axe: Choose one of your own cards to discard
choose.gender_swords: Choose a card to give them
choose.harvest: Harvest — choose one of the revealed cards
demand.strike_duel: Duel — play a Strike, or take the damage
demand.strike_barbarian: Barbarian Invasion — play a Strike, or take the damage
demand.dodge_arrows: Arrows are raining down — play a Dodge, or take the damage
demand.strike_duress: Duress — Strike the named target, or give up your weapon
